first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both award the same score (5/10) and cite the exact same core reason for the mediocre rating: a lack of demonstrated experience in experimentation platforms, metrics, and growth engineering. Minor differences in wording, such as framing the candidate as a 'full-stack generalist' in the variant, are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run noise and do not change the fundamental assessment.
